summary: Adds AFFiNE Y.js document integrity checks and a narrow missing-children repair command.
reason: AFFiNE Blocksuite requires every block, including leaves, to carry sys:children as a Y.Array. Live docs can become unreadable in FramePreview when generated blocks omit it.
validated_outcome: go test ./... and publish validate cover build, CLI wiring, and integrity unit tests.
